characters.name: Abby Tucker
characters.description: Abby TuckerGenderFemaleProduction InformationFirst appearanceArmy Buddy(Only appearance) Abby Tuckeris a army cadet andReese's friend from his time in the military. She comes to visit Reese at this home in the episodeArmy Buddy. In the episode she is revealed to have a crush on Reese's momLois.

characters.name: Abe Kenarban
characters.description: Abraham KenarbanMalcolm in the MiddleLife's Still UnfairNickname(s)DadGenderMaleAge40sOccupationUnknownMember ofThe Gentlemen CallersFamily & FriendsSpouseKitty Kenarban(ex-wife)ParentsUnnamed Grandmother4 Unnamed AuntsChildrenStevie Kenarban(son)Other relativesMax (grandson)Glen (son-in-law)FriendsHalTreyMalikBrianSteveLoisEnemiesCraig FeldsparLois(temporary in "Kitty's Back")Hal(temporary in "Long Drive")Production InformationFirst appearanceMalcolm in the Middle: "Sleepover"Life's Still Unfair: "Episode One"Last appearanceMalcolm in the Middle: "Graduation""Life's Still Unfair: "Episode Four"Portrayed byGary Anthony Williams Abraham "Abe" Kenarban, played by Gary Anthony Williams is the devoted father toStevieand husband toKitty. He is alsoHal's best friend and enjoys playing poker with him and his other friends, Trey, Malik, Brian, and Steve. In the episode, "Dinner Out", he mentions he was raised by his grandmother and four spinster aunts. When sufficiently scared or unnerved, he is prone to asthma attacks, coincidentally, just like Stevie.

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: AlbertAlbert, portrayed byMichael Dean Jacobs, is a character inMalcolm in the Middle. He can be seen in the episode:Malcolm's Job. Albert worked atLucky Aideas a grade-five employee in the warehouse;Loismentioned that Albert has been put in 20 years of service time, as of the time of Malcolm's Job. In the episode, he can be seen supervisingMalcolm, as he flattens boxes.

characters.name: Alison
characters.description: AlisonGenderFemaleAge16Birthday1986Family & FriendsFriendsMalcolm(ex-boyfriend)Reese(ex-boyfriend)EnemiesCraig FeldsparProduction InformationFirst appearanceStupid GirlLast appearanceAcademic OctathalonPortrayed byBrittany Renee FinamoreAlisonwas the first serious girlfriend ofReese. She is not a very smart girl, whose intelligence level is just about as high as Reese's, and she first appeared in the episodeStupid Girl. However, as he mentions, Alison has shown to be a lot smarter than him, as most people are. Alison first appeared in the episode "Stupid Girl.  Malcolm had a crush on Alison, but his hyper intelligence was confusing to her.  Acting dumb like Reese, he managed to calm down and relax to win her over. Alison and Malcolm went to the dance together. While on their way drinking,StevieandLoisbust them in the act. They subsequently broke up, after which Reese began dating Alison. InMalcolm Holds His Tongue, Malcolm and Stevie witnesses Reese and Alison arguing. He wishes to accompany her to a concert, but unfortunately, his driver's license has been suspended due to his public defender refusing to use the insanity defense given his past issues with the law. Thus, Alison made her ultimatum clear to Reese: Either he finds a driver, or she'll dump him. He attempts to get Hal and Lois to help him out and chauffer them to the concert. They gave Reese a resoundingNOand pointed out that he needed to find someone else to chauffer him and Alison. He ultimately turns toCraigand bribes him with a large cinnamon roll to chauffer them there. On that night, they learned Craig intentionally drives past the concert. Reese and Alison demand he stop the car at once. They point out that he missed the drop-off spot for them to go to the concert. Craig tries to convince them of other fun activities and revealing his own plans for his night. He wants to start off by going on a hayride, then go to dinner at an Italian restaurant and end it with a bonfire at the beach. Reese is angered over what Craig has done to him and Alison. He exclaims that Craig has just ruined his and Alison's date because of it. He snaps in anger, pulls the car over, and yells at both her and Reese for ruining his night that he had been planning for 34 years. Craig tells the two off they're not going to the concert, but rather a hayride, dinner, and a bonfire at the beach. He mentions they're going to enjoy this whether they like it or not. Fed up with Craig's tirades, Alison pepper-sprays his eyes with a can of mace. She is angry, shocked, and humiliated when she hears him complain to Reese about her being nice and liking him. Alison immediately unbuckles her seatbelt and exits the car. Reese tries to follow her out, but she positions the can of mace in front of him and threatens to pepper spray his eyes next if he doesn't allow her to go her own way. Seeing how angry Alison is with him, he nervously tells her that he'll see her at school tomorrow. She slams the door in front of Reese a

characters.name: Amelia
characters.description: AmeliaGenderFemaleFamily & FriendsSpousePeteParentsWalter(Deceased)Sharon(Deceased)SiblingsHal(brother)Claire(sister)EnemiesLoisProduction InformationFirst appearanceFamily Reunion(Only Appearance)Portrayed byBrenda StrongAmelia, played byBrenda Strong, is the daughter ofWalterandSharon, the aunt of Dewey, Francis, Malcolm and Reese and the sister ofHalandClaire. Like most of the family on Hal's side she has a dislike for Lois and appears to be a snobby and elegant woman. She only appeared in "Family Reunion", where she plotted with her older sister,Claire, to getLoisout of the family portrait. They succeeded at their plans, but they didn't get off Scott-free. The boys got revenge on them by destroying their specially baked cake and ruining the family meal while driving the golf cart (Walter's present) into the pool.

characters.description: AngelaAngela, portrayed byMyra McWethy, was a character onMalcolm in the Middle. She can be seen in the episode:Motivational Speaker.

characters.name: Angela Pozefsky
characters.description: Angela PozefskyGenderFemaleFamily & FriendsParentsIvan PozefskyMrs. PozefskySiblingsNick PozefskyMax PozefskyAlexandra PozefskyFriendsMalcolm(ex-boyfriend)Stevie Kenarban(ex-boyfriend)Production InformationFirst appearanceMalcolm Dates a FamilyPortrayed bySara PaxtonAngela Pozefkyis a girl that Malcolm had a love interest for in the episodeMalcolm Dates a Family. Angela is a girl who has an overbearing and humiliating family. She was a girl who Malcolm wanted to take to the Spring Dance in the episodeMalcolm Dates a Family. When he started talking to her, he was mystified by the fact that no other boy had asked her out and hopefully assumed that it was because she was so promiscuous, that other boys were intimidated by her. Upon talking to her, he then found out that the real reason was because her family doesn't allow her to date anyone they don’t approve of. She described her family as intrusive, overbearing, controlling, and humiliating, which Malcolm could relate to. When she brought Malcolm to her house, she revealed that she had a huge family. The family started to interview him with a bunch of questions about his personality. When they found out he was a genius, they proved to be a bunch of geniuses too. Eventually, Malcolm started bonding with her family better than he did with her and they didn't talk to each other for two weeks. It got to the point where he forgot that he was dating her and then accepting another girl to the Spring Dance. When Malcolm remembered he was dating her, he made the decision to break up with her and go to the dance with the other girl, Sarah. When they broke up, The Pozefsky family would no longer allow Malcolm to see them anymore and they had to get rid of him the way a couple would if they broke up. They would soon be visited by Malcolm again, wanting to get back together with her, but unfortunately for him, Angela had moved on and started dating Stevie. Angela is a generally unhappy and miserable girl with plenty of negative feelings. Her main problem with her life is her family and how they completely control everything that happens to her and shares pretty much the same opinions on them that Malcolm does for his family. She even comes to grips with the belief that she is going to die alone, and she seems so used to these terrible feelings, that she's grown to just brush them off and live with them. Angela is a generally unhappy and miserable girl with plenty of negative feelings. She even comes to grips with the belief that she is going to die alone, and she seems so used to these terrible feelings, that she's grown to just brush them off and live with them.

characters.name: Anita
characters.description: AnitaGenderFemaleAge46Birthday1959Production InformationFirst appearanceBurning ManPortrayed byRosanna ArquetteAnitais a sexy clairvoyant/hippie girl who appeared in the episodeBurning Man. WhenMalcolmmet Anita, he began to sympathize with her and realize they shared the same feelings. They kept going deeper and deeper to the point where they sympathized on a spiritual level and they both fell in love with each other. He found her attractive from the start.  Anita was working as a nurse at Burning Man. She had her own tent where she took care of people who had been sickened or hurt during the event. When Malcolm came in, claiming to have stepped on a cactus, Anita started sucking on his foot, much to his disturbance. Anita could apparently understand his emotions telepathically, and told Malcolm that he had been internalizing a lot of criticism. She told him that his problem was that he had an incredible amount of passion in his soul and that he had to let it out, as well as needing a tetanus shot. Malcolm started to get turned on by her, despite the fact that she was a complete nut job and she was as old as hismom. Anita explained to him everything about how medicinal healing doesn't actually cure any problems with the body. It just silences the "noise". Listening to the noise they make, however, and embracing your inner self is what truly cures you of your diseases. They both started to go extremely deep into a conversation with each other. The conversation, in the end, led to Anita sleeping with Malcolm.

characters.name: April
characters.description: AprilGenderFemaleAge13Family & FriendsFriendsMalcolm (possibly)EnemiesReeseProduction InformationFirst appearanceWater ParkPortrayed byAmanda FullerAprilis a girl thatReesehad a crush on in the episodeWater Park. She goes to school with him and Reese loves her because he's heard that she's hot and sexy in a bikini. However, April hates Reese for being a perverted jerk.  At the water park,Malcolmand Reese were in an argument and were going back and forth, getting revenge on each other. He thought of a way to get revenge of Reese through April. Her first appearance was when Malcolm asked Reese why he loved her. Reese told her that she was "trampy" and he'd heard rumors that she always kissed with her tongue, only to find out that she was standing behind him the whole time. April called him a "jerk" and ran off. Later, Malcolm got revenge on Reese again by pulling down his swim trunks in front of a bunch of girls there. One of which was April.

characters.name: Aunt Felicia
characters.description: FeliciaAunt Feliciais a character inMalcolm in the Middle. She's one ofHal's aunts. InVegas,Loismentions her while showingHalthe presents she got forJamie.

characters.name: Helen Kenzel
characters.description: Helen KenzelGenderFemaleFamily & FriendsSpouseFred (deceased)SiblingsIda Welker(sister)Several unnamed brothersOther relativesLois(niece)Susan Welker(niece)Production InformationLast appearanceFuneral(mentioned)Helen Kenzelis Ida's late sister and Lois and Susan's aunt. Aunt Helen wasLois' maternal aunt andIda'ssister. She was also the wife and later widow of Uncle Fred. Although she is never seen on screen, she is first mentioned inPilotby Hal who assumes Lois wasn't going to mention her condition until after she had a biopsy. Aunt Helen passes away sometime before the episodeFuneraland the entire episode centers around her funeral.

characters.name: Barton
characters.description: BartonGenderMaleAge8-10Family & FriendsFriendsKrelboynesProduction InformationFirst appearanceReese's JobPortrayed byWill StabileBarton, who is played by Will Stabile, was the new student in theKrelboyneclass, and a prodigy whomMr. Herkabewanted to rule the world with and place as a challenge to Malcolm in intelligence.  He appeared for the first and only time in the 2002 episode, "Reese's Job." Serving as a frenemy toMalcolm, Barton uses his superior intellect to not only overshine the protagonist, but also proveRichie's innocence due to his public urination charge.  Of course, Richie is almost immediately busted for stealing the money fromReese's cash register.  Barton describes his brain as a beehive, "and every bee has a brain like Malcolm's" At the end of the episode, it is revealed that Barton transfers due to his mother finding Herkabe creepy for using her son for his own self-aggrandizement and leaves the show after his first appearance to work at NASA.Kevintells him to make sure to send the Krelboynes a letter when he gets declassified.

characters.name: BeeBee
characters.description: BeeBeeBeeBeeisFrancis' girlfriend from the episodeFrancis Escapes. BeeBee is an unintelligent and lazy girl who doesn't care about anything or even know the meaning of most of the things she hears. She was a girl that he was deeply in love with, and he always expressed his love and emotion for her, but she didn't really care for him. Francis escapedmilitary schoolto see her again, only for her to dump him. It was implied that while he was at Marlin, BeeBee, was cheating on him withRichie. She breaks up with Francis and admits that she was more attracted to his friend because he doesn't care about love but rather about life. She also says the reason she liked the long distant relationship because he would call and make her feel good about herself. BeeBee was briefly seen in the flashback ofPilotduring Francis' apology to Hal implying that he had sex with her. BeeBee's Favorite Show isBuffy The Vampire SlayerBecause she can cope Vampire Slayers AndSarah Michelle GellarThat May Identify her. Buffy is another show that20th Century Fox Televisionhave made.

characters.name: Bernard
characters.description: BernardBernardwas the class hamster atDewey's school. The students take turns, taking care of it at their homes every week. Dewey took care of it in the episodeHealth Scare. Although this was the only episode where he actually took care of him, Bernard would make several cameo appearances in later episodes of season three. Bernard first appeared in the episodeHealth Scare, whereDeweywas taking care of him at his house for the week. He tried to convinceHalandLoisthat because he was taking such good care of Bernard, then he could have the responsibility to have a pet dog. Being concerned with bigger problems, Hal and Lois completely ignored him. Later, Lance, Dewey's bully at Dewey's school confronted him on the sidewalk, saying that next week, he would be the one taking care of Bernard, and made it obvious that he was going to abuse him when he did. Wanting to save him, Dewey decided to set Bernard free to live on his own, instead of being abused by a bully. So, Dewey put Bernard in a hamster ball and filled it to the brim with cheerios and tearfully set him outside, to roll away and live on his own. Bernard was seen again in the episodePoker. WhileDeweywas filmingReesedancing with his mom. Outside the window, Bernard's food filled ball was seen in the background, rolling across the street.

He tried to convinceHalandLoisthat because he was taking such good care of Bernard, then he could have the responsibility to have a pet dog. Being concerned with bigger problems, Hal and Lois completely ignored him. Later, Lance, Dewey's bully at Dewey's school confronted him on the sidewalk, saying that next week, he would be the one taking care of Bernard, and made it obvious that he was going to abuse him when he did. Wanting to save him, Dewey decided to set Bernard free to live on his own, instead of being abused by a bully. So, Dewey put Bernard in a hamster ball and filled it to the brim with cheerios and tearfully set him outside, to roll away and live on his own. Bernard was seen again in the episodePoker. WhileDeweywas filmingReesedancing with his mom. Outside the window, Bernard's food filled ball was seen in the background, rolling across the street.

characters.name: Beth Ballard
characters.description: Beth BallardGenderFemaleAge14-15Family & FriendsFriendsMalcolm(love interest)EnemiesMicah BellProduction InformationOnly appearanceBowlingPortrayed byAlex McKennaBeth Ballardis the love interest ofMalcolmandReesein the episodeBowling. The two of them both tried making her fall in love with them, which turned into a competition. Beth is an extremely attractive student who goes to Malcolm and Reese's school. She has made lots of boys fall in love with her, and even one of her teachers got fired for expressing too much interest in her. She was seen at the bowling alley, with some other kids, including Malcolm and Reese and the two of them both tried to make a move on her. When Reese attempted to impress her, what he did was make a disgusting joke which involved him spitting his drink on her face, which disgusted her and caused her rightfully to hate him. Malcolm on the other hand, would be constantly humiliated and ridiculed in front of her. However, Beth was attracted to Malcolm and so he ended up being the boy who won her over. There are two alternate endings to what happened in their relationship, and both of them involve them being together.

characters.name: Billboard Girl
characters.description: Billboard GirlGenderFemaleAge20'sProduction InformationFirst appearanceBillboardPortrayed byJennifer LyonsTheBillboard Girlis an unnamed character who appeared in the episodeBillboard. She is a model who was seen on a billboard, advertising a strip club. She is portrayed by Jenifer Lyons. On their way home, The Family passed by a billboard with a picture of a stripper on it. Every male in the car was staring at her, including evenJamie, butLoiswas completely oblivious to the billboard and the fact that the guys were staring at it. Later,Malcolm,Dewey, andReesedecided to take advantage of the billboard by going up there, late at night and spray painting something funny on it. While Malcolm and Dewey were pondering what kind of vandalism to create, Reese went right on ahead and spray painted a speech bubble for her, saying "I want Reese." Reese was almost done with the sentence until a pain can fell off the billboard and landed on the car of Lois, who was walking out of one of the circuit stores just at that time. The lights to the billboard came on, exposing the trio to Lois and everyone else who was walking by at that time. They were about to be in huge trouble, but Malcolm quickly thought of a genius plan to make it look like they were doing something good. He used the spray paint bottle to "finish" the unfinished sentence that Reese was making. Reese had spray painted "I want Re" before he had to stop, and so Malcolm changed it to "I want Respect" and claimed that this was done in protest against women oppression. Lois did not buy the act, but everyone else around her did and it was only a short matter of time before a crowd of feminists were in the area, making their "campaign" even bigger.

characters.name: Billy Prescott
characters.description: Billy PrescottGenderMaleAge9-11Family & FriendsParentsMrs. Prescott(mother)SiblingsIra PrescottFriendsDeweyEnemiesReeseDewey(formerly)Production InformationOnly appearanceForbidden GirlfriendPortrayed byLogan A. GrahamBilly Prescottis a neighborhood boy who looks strikingly similar toDeweyfrom behind. Out of the goodness of his heart, he does random acts of kindness for people like mowing their lawns and raking their leaves. Since people think he's Dewey, they go on to give Dewey money and rewards for what they thought he did, which he gives Billy his share at the end of the day. He appeared in "Forbidden Girlfriend". Billy makes his only appearance in "Forbidden Girlfriend". Despite having different eye color from Dewey, the two looked similar with their blond hair and build. When Reese discovered who Billy was and that Dewey was stealing his money, he took advantage of the situation by making Dewey pull pranks on his enemies and letting Billy be the fall guy. One of those pranks involves a car that happened to belong to his older brother: an angry high school bully named Ira. By having Billy be blamed for the prank he pulled by having Dewey dump cement powder and mixing it with water, Reese is able to get his revenge on Ira. Disguised as a bystander, Reese identifies Dewey as Billy Prescott and shouts out where Billy Soon Dewey turns Reese's plan against him by presumably explaining his actions to Billy and requested for both his and Ira's help. He has Billy pose as him in doing his homework. Being none the wiser and believing that Dewey is doing his homework, Reese tells him about his plans to use Billy again as his fall guy with various pranks on his other enemies. He is taken by surprise when he turns "Dewey" and finds an angry Billy staring blankly and intentionally at him in his place. Dewey reveals himself hiding in the closet with Ira. Both boys watch as an angry Ira beats Reese up in revenge for his prank and using Billy as his fall guy.

characters.name: Boy Baby
characters.description: Boy BabyGenderMaleAge2Family & FriendsFriendsGirl Baby(girlfriend)Production InformationFirst appearanceDewey's OperaTheBoy Babyis the boyfriend of theGirl Baby. He appeared in the episodeDewey's Opera. Jamieand aGirl Babywere in love with each other, and always looked at each other through their windows. However, one day, a boy baby appeared in the same house as the girl baby and it was obvious that they were already boyfriend and girlfriend, putting an end to Jamie's chances with the girl baby.

characters.name: Boyd
characters.description: Nicki's FatherGenderMaleAge43-62Family & FriendsChildrenNicki(daughter)Brandon (son)Production InformationFirst appearanceForbidden GirlfriendPortrayed byMichael Shamus WilesBoydis the father ofNickiand a former war veteran. He is an angry father who disapproves ofMalcolmbeing Nicki's boyfriend and strictly forbids her to ever see him. Boyd is a former war veteran who used to fight in Vietnam. Sometime either before or after the war, Boyd and Leslie gave birth to Nicki and a son. At some point, he and his wife split up and it is not clear where she is. Boyd raised his both his children, and it is not really mentioned of his wife taking part in a split custody. He is completely overprotective of Nicki, therefore makes up tons of rules for her and forces her to follow them. Nicki is so repressed by her father, that she likes to completely ignore him and sneak around, doing things she's not supposed to do.
